_comment: Roboflow index -> canonical index. Canonical order is the CANON list in 05_prepare_yolo.py. Rows marked VERIFY must be checked with 07_inspect_class.py before you trust them. Use 22 ('unknown') rather than -1 to drop: deleting a box turns that component into BACKGROUND and actively teaches YOLO to suppress it.
_2: Capacitor Jumper      -> capacitor   (Kaggle has no jumper subtype)
_7: Electrolytic Capacitor-> capacitor   (visually distinct, but Kaggle merges it)
_11: Jumper                -> unknown     ** VERIFY ** (wire link? or a pin header -> pins?)
_16: Resistor Jumper       -> resistor    (0-ohm link; Kaggle has no subtype)
_17: Resistor Network      -> resistor    ** VERIFY ** (SOIC-like package: Kaggle may call it 'ic')
_19: Test Point            -> pads        ** VERIFY ** (could be its own thing)
_22: iC                    -> ic          (case bug in their yaml)
